content:
- Resumed at TO BE VERIFIED for `.ralph/tasks/bugs/remove-panics-expects-unwraps.md`, did deep skeptical review with broad parallel scans, and changed the plan (explicit match-vs-Result guidance + compile-only checkpoint), then flipped marker to NOW EXECUTE.
- Executed the plan: removed all `panic!`, `.expect(...)`, `.expect_err(...)`, and unwrap usage from scoped test modules (`tests/bdd_state_watch.rs`, `src/state/watch_state.rs`, `src/process/worker.rs`, `src/dcs/{worker,store,keys}.rs`, `src/ha/{decide,worker}.rs`, `src/pginfo/{state,query}.rs`, `src/config/parser.rs`) using fallible tests and `matches!` assertions.
- Hit one compile issue during `cargo test --all-targets --no-run`: `ha::decide` tests were returning `WorkerError` while `decide()` returns `DecideError`; fixed by switching those test return types/imports to `DecideError`.
- Verification evidence: zero-callsite sweep passed (`rg` no matches), compile-only gate passed, focused test slices all passed, and required gates passed sequentially (`make check`, `make test`, `make test-bdd`, `make lint`).
- Closed task artifacts: updated task file status/checkboxes/evidence with `<status>done</status> <passes>true</passes> <passing>true</passing>`, appended new learning to `AGENTS.md`, and ran `/bin/bash .ralph/task_switch.sh`.
- Next immediate step before handing off is commit all files with required message format including gate evidence and note about the DecideError/WorkerError mismatch fix.

- Read .ralph/current_tasks.md and applied bug-first rule before meta-task selection.
- Found two open bug tasks with <passes>false</passes>; no explicit priority tags on either.
- Chose .ralph/tasks/bugs/test-harness-binary-check-panics.md as next task because it directly fixes policy-violating panic behavior in harness binary checks.
- Wrote selected task path to .ralph/current_task.txt and stopped immediately.

- Read startup memory via progress_read, then loaded `.ralph/current_task.txt` and the current task `.ralph/tasks/bugs/test-harness-binary-check-panics.md`.
- Did parallel research scans across harness + call sites + related tests/modules. Key finding: `src/test_harness/binaries.rs` already returns `Result<PathBuf, HarnessError>` and reports missing binaries via `HarnessError::InvalidInput`; no panic path found there.
- Wrote a full execution plan into the task file with verification-first logic, explicit stale-vs-active branching, focused test commands, required gate sequence, and closure steps.
- Added terminal marker `TO BE VERIFIED` at end of the plan exactly as requested; intentionally did not execute implementation/gates in this turn.
- Next step for the following engineer/turn: perform deep skeptical verification of the plan, change at least one item, then replace marker with `NOW EXECUTE` before execution phase.
